introSection:
Loopingbahn was a wooden travelling roller coaster owned by German showman Hilmar Gropengiesser.

It opened with two consecutive circular vertical loops made of steel, but these were removed from the coaster in 1954 after being condemned by the police due to reports of spinal pain.
fullText:
Loopingbahn was a wooden travelling roller coaster owned by German showman Hilmar Gropengiesser.

It opened with two consecutive circular vertical loops made of steel, but these were removed from the coaster in 1954 after being condemned by the police due to reports of spinal pain.
